author: doll-agent
content: Add Polynomial::from_roots(&[f64]) -> Self in power.rs that builds (x - r0)*(x - r1)*... by repeated convolve-with-[-r,1] (linear-time per root, quadratic overall). Add a default from_roots method on the FromPowerBasis trait that delegates: build power coeffs, then call Self::from_power_basis. This gives Chebyshev / Hermite / HermiteE / Legendre / Laguerre the same constructor for free. Tests: empty roots → constant 1, single root, quadratic expansion, repeated root, zero root, eval-at-each-root-is-zero, plus a Chebyshev cross-basis test that confirms the trait default works through the FromPowerBasis path.
